versions.version_description: Different key, some chord changes, optimized for use with autoscroll.

My version of "Kissed from a rose" is 4 semi-notes higher than the original. So it's especially suitable for higher voices. Some parts (like the bridge) are modified and were inspired by this cover https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=C3ixiCgug-8 of the song. Every chord marked with a star is supposed to be played as a barre chord. You could also play the intro on your guitar instead of singing it. I hope you have fun playing it.
I couldn't find a complete version of the song with tabs for the "solos" and normal chords for the verses and choruses and lyrics for everything, so I made one based on the already existing ones.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Kiss From A Rose
Capo on 3rd fret

[Intro]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
Duba dabu dubiduu...[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
Duba dabu dubiduu...[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]
  There used to be a greying tower alone on the sea[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]
You became the light on the dark side of me [/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
Love remains a drug that's the high, not the pill[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Em[/ch]
But did you know that when it snows,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]
My eyes become large and the light that you shine can be seen[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]
Baby, I compare you to a kiss from a rose on the grey[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]
Ooh, the more I get of you the stranger it feels, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
And now that your rose is in bloom[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]
A light hits the gloom on the grey[/tab]

[Interlude]
[tab][ch]CM7[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
Duba dabu dubiduu...[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]

[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]     N.C.
You remain my power, my pleasure, my pain, baby,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]E[/ch]
to me you're like a growing addiction that I can't deny[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]

[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
But did you know that when it snows,[/tab]
